prompt: A stunning photorealistic cinematic portrait of a beautiful young Indian woman standing on an ornate carved stone balcony at night, shown from about mid-thigh up in a vertical composition. She has very long flowing wavy black hair cascading over one shoulder, fair skin, delicate jewelry including dangling earrings and a small pendant necklace, and elegant evening styling. Her face is turned upward in profile toward a bright full moon, with a serene, emotional expression. She wears a sleeveless white-to-lavender-to-deep-purple ombre gradient gown with a V neckline, sheer flowing skirt, and delicate purple floral embroidery on the bodice. Her hands rest gracefully on a dark carved wooden balcony railing. The setting features ornate palace-like architecture with carved stone arches and columns on the left, an old-fashioned warm glowing lantern mounted beside her, and decorative Gothic-style railing details. In the background, show a dark blue starry night sky with thin clouds, one large luminous full moon in the upper right, and a distant glowing city skyline beside water with soft bokeh lights and reflections. Use warm lantern light from the left, cool dramatic moonlight from above and right, rich contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric texture, high-detail embroidery, cinematic film lighting, 8k photorealism, romantic serene atmosphere, no text, no extra people.
